SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-14-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:53AM

Judge Pro Tem Theresa Moore, clerk - Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Fred Jalilie present with witness, Blanca Rodriguez. Respondent, Natalia Carney present in pro per. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Theresa Moore.

EXRA: Photos, reciepts, copies of checks and lease; collectively marked
EXA1: Copies of letters, rent board information, lease, reciepts and copy of cancelled check; collectively marked.

10:26AM
Exhibits Retained. Case submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-06-2011 Judgment Entered
